cases.question: Which 5 companies have the most total connections in our database — counting ownership relationships, news mentions, and industry category links combined?

MATCH (o:Organization)
WITH o,
  COUNT { (o)-[:HAS_SUBSIDIARY]-() }   AS ownershipLinks,
  COUNT { ()-[:MENTIONS]->(o) }        AS mentionLinks,
  COUNT { (o)-[:IN_INDUSTRY]->() }     AS industryLinks,
  COUNT { (o)-[:HAS_CATEGORY]->() }    AS categoryLinks

cases.question: Which company pairs appear in both positive and negative news stories? I'm looking for companies that generate mixed sentiment coverage together. Show the top 10 pairs.
cases.generated_cypher:
CYPHER 25
MATCH (a:Article)-[:MENTIONS]->(o1:Organization),
      (a)-[:MENTIONS]->(o2:Organization)
WHERE o1.name < o2.name
WITH o1, o2, collect(DISTINCT a) AS sharedArticles
WITH o1, o2,
     size([x IN sharedArticles WHERE x.sentiment > 0]) AS posCount,
     size([x IN sharedArticles WHERE x.sentiment < 0]) AS negCount
WHERE posCount > 0 AND negCount > 0
RETURN o1.name AS company1, o2.name AS company2,
       posCount, negCount, posCount + negCount AS totalArticles
ORDER BY totalArticles DESC
LIMIT 10

gate_details.reason: Syntax error: {neo4j_code: Neo.ClientError.Security.AuthenticationRateLimit} {message: The client has provided incorrect authentication details too many times in a row.} {gql_status: 42NFF} {gql_status_description: error: syntax error or access rule violation - permission/access denied. cases.question: By industry category, give me a comprehensive picture: how many companies are in each category, how many news articles mention them in total, what is the average sentiment of that coverage, and how many subsidiaries exist across the group? Show the top 10 categories by total article count.
cases.generated_cypher:
CYPHER 25
MATCH (cat:IndustryCategory)<-[:IN_INDUSTRY]-(o:Organization)
WITH cat, collect(DISTINCT o) AS companies
CALL (cat, companies) {
  UNWIND companies AS o
  OPTIONAL MATCH (a:Article)-[:MENTIONS]->(o)
  WITH collect(DISTINCT a) AS allArticles
  WITH [a IN allArticles WHERE a IS NOT NULL] AS articles
  RETURN size(articles) AS articleCount,
         CASE WHEN size(articles) > 0
              THEN reduce(s = 0.0, a IN articles | s + a.sentiment) / size(articles)
              ELSE null END AS avgSentiment
}
CALL (cat, companies) {
  UNWIND companies AS o
  OPTIONAL MATCH (o)-[:HAS_SUBSIDIARY]->(sub:Organization)
  RETURN count(DISTINCT sub) AS subsidiaryCount
}
RETURN cat.name                AS category,
       size(companies)         AS companyCount,
       articleCount,
       round(avgSentiment, 3)  AS avgSentiment,
       subsidiaryCount
ORDER BY articleCount DESC
LIMIT 10

gate_details.reason: Syntax error: {neo4j_code: Neo.ClientError.Security.AuthenticationRateLimit} {message: The client has provided incorrect authentication details too many times in a row.} {gql_status: 42NFF} {gql_status_description: error: syntax error or access rule violation - permission/access denied. CALL db.index.fulltext.queryNodes('entity', 'Microsoft') YIELD node AS org, score

OPTIONAL MATCH (org)-[:IN_INDUSTRY]->(ic:IndustryCategory)
WITH org, score,

     COUNT { (org)-[:HAS_SUBSIDIARY]->(:Organization) } AS subsidiaryCount,

       MATCH (a:Article)-[:MENTIONS]->(org)
       RETURN a.title
       ORDER BY a.date DESC
       LIMIT 3
     } AS topHeadlines
RETURN org.name        AS company,
       industries,
       topHeadlines,
       articleCount,
       subsidiaryCount
ORDER BY score DESC

cases.question: For companies with at least 5 subsidiaries, show the most positively-covered news article about each (if any), and list the names of companies that sit two levels down in their ownership hierarchy. Return up to 10 companies.
cases.generated_cypher:
CYPHER 25
MATCH (org:Organization)-[:HAS_SUBSIDIARY]->(sub:Organization)
WITH org, count(sub) AS subCount
WHERE subCount >= 5
OPTIONAL MATCH (a:Article)-[:MENTIONS]->(org)
WITH org, subCount, a
ORDER BY a.sentiment DESC
WITH org, subCount, collect(a)[0] AS topArticle
OPTIONAL MATCH (org)-[:HAS_SUBSIDIARY]->(:Organization)-[:HAS_SUBSIDIARY]->(level2:Organization)
WITH org, subCount, topArticle, collect(DISTINCT level2.name) AS twoLevelsDown
RETURN org.name                  AS company,
       subCount                  AS directSubsidiaryCount,
       topArticle.title          AS topArticleTitle,
       topArticle.sentiment      AS topArticleSentiment,
       twoLevelsDown             AS twoLevelsDownCompanies
ORDER BY subCount DESC
LIMIT 10

cases.question: Classify every company into one of four groups: those with both subsidiaries and press coverage, those with subsidiaries but no press coverage, those with press coverage but no subsidiaries, and those with neither. How many companies fall into each group?
cases.generated_cypher:
CYPHER 25
MATCH (o:Organization)
WITH o,
     EXISTS { (o)-[:HAS_SUBSIDIARY]->(:Organization) } AS hasSubsidiaries,
     EXISTS { ()-[:MENTIONS]->(o) }                    AS hasCoverage
WITH CASE
       WHEN hasSubsidiaries AND hasCoverage           THEN 'subsidiaries + coverage'
       WHEN hasSubsidiaries AND NOT hasCoverage       THEN 'subsidiaries only'
       WHEN NOT hasSubsidiaries AND hasCoverage       THEN 'coverage only'
       ELSE                                                'neither'
     END AS groupLabel
RETURN groupLabel, count(*) AS companyCount
ORDER BY companyCount DESC

gate_details.reason: Syntax error: {neo4j_code: Neo.ClientError.Security.Unauthorized} {message: The client is unauthorized due to authentication failure.} {gql_status: 42NFF} {gql_status_description: error: syntax error or access rule violation - permission/access denied. Access denied, see the security logs for details.}
